summary: Completed testing of iteration 143 features: 1) Trade streak fix - now correctly starts from previous trading day if today not yet traded (shows 13 streak), 2) Member self-edit widget - GET /api/profit/my-recent-transactions and PUT /api/profit/my-transactions/{id} working, 3) Admin Transactions page - 4 tabs (All/Deposits/Withdrawals/Profits), user search, profit filter all working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade streak correctly shows 13 (user traded Feb 17-Mar 5). My Recent Transactions widget displays 2 withdrawals both marked as 'Locked' (older than 48hrs). Admin Transactions page has 4 tabs with Profits tab showing 15 entries with blue 'PROFIT' badge and 'System' label. User search filters by name/email.

trade_streak_fix.GET /api/trade/streak: PASS - Returns streak=13 for test user (was 0 before fix)
trade_streak_fix.streak_calculation: PASS - Correctly starts from previous trading day if today not yet traded
trade_streak_fix.frontend_display: PASS - Trade Monitor shows '13 streak' indicator with flame icon

member_self_edit_widget.frontend_widget: PASS - 'My Recent Transactions' widget visible below Recent Activity on Profit Tracker
member_self_edit_widget.editable_flag: PASS - Shows 'Locked' for transactions older than 48hrs, 'Edited' badge for previously corrected

admin_transactions_page.4_tabs: PASS - All, Deposits, Withdrawals, Profits tabs visible

admin_transactions_page.profit_badge: PASS - Blue 'PROFIT' badge displayed for profit entries
admin_transactions_page.system_label: PASS - 'System' label shown in Actions column for profit entries
